title: Create: Project Civilization
description: This mod was made to be used on the Create: Civilization SMP with additions to the mods there adding new to them.
body:
[![RubyHost Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734de55b9d68de8d0d141c95b975144be608660a_0.webp)](https://billing.rubyhost.net/aff.php?aff=22)
# Create: Project Civilization

Create: Project Civilization or CPC is a mod made specifically for the [Create: Civilization SMP](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-civilization-smp) modpack, adding commonly asked features and uses for stuff from other mods. If you haven't played it yet, give it a shot, you'll love it as much as everyone who plays does.

![Create: Civilization Discord Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95b95cbe95c1aba2eb0bca8bb7cfdd01b535ee92.png)
[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/3K3ydtmcZv) | [Website](https://www.createcivilization.com/)

This mod is not meant to be used outside the [Create: Civilization Modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-civilization-smp) so dependencies aren't listed and balance and additions of the mod will be based on the server's needs. This mod is not made by the [Create: Civilization team](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/create-civilization-smp), if you have any question about the modpack join the discord server.
